title.ko: 탄약 신관(폭파약포의 기폭구 F42B 3/10; 화학적 사항 C06C); 기폭정비 또는 그에 따른 안전기구(신관을 채우는 것 F42B 33/02; 신관에서 또는 신관으로의 외관을 설치 또는 제거 F42B 33/04; 신관용기 F42B 39/30)
title.en: AMMUNITION FUZES (blasting cartridge initiators F42B0003100000;chemical aspects C06C); ARMING OR SAFETY MEANS THEREFOR (filling fuzes F42B0033020000;fitting or extracting primers in or from fuzes F42B0033040000;containers for fuzes F42B0039300000)

definition.ko: 신관작동의 원리 충격 F42C1/00 액체의 접촉 F42C3/00 액체의 압력 F42C5/00 기계적 힘 F42C7/00 비전기시한신관 F42C9/00 전기신관 F42C11/00 근접신관 F42C13/00 복합신관 F42C9/00 탄약의 형에 특징이 있는 신관 F42C14/00 기폭정비 또는 안전기구 F42C15/00 신관조정 F42C17/00 그 밖의 세부 F42C19/00 검사, 시험 F42C21/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 F42C99/00

title.ko: 충격신관, 즉 탄약충격에 의해서만 작동하는 신관
title.en: Impact fuzes, i.e. fuzes actuated only by ammunition impact

title.ko: 신관과 구조적으로 조합된 격침이 있는 것
title.en: with firing pin structurally combined with fuze
operating by inertia of members on impact
for any direction of impact

title.ko: 신관의 점화후 지연작동을 하는 것(시한신관 F42C 9/00)
title.en: with delayed action after ignition of fuze (time fuzes F42C0009000000)
the fuze activating a propulsive charge for propelling the ammunition or the warhead into the air, e.g. in rebounding projectiles

title.ko: 격침이 없는 것
title.en: without firing pin

title.ko: 신관의 점화후 지연동작이 있는 것(시한신관 F42C 9/00)
title.en: with delayed action after ignition of fuze (time fuzes F42C0009000000)
operating at a predetermined distance from ground or target by means of a protruding member

title.ko: 액체, 예. 해수에 접촉하므로써 작동하는 신관(F42C 5/00이 우선; 시한신관 F42C 9/00)
title.en: Fuzes actuated by exposure to a liquid, e.g. sea-water (F42C0005000000 takes precedence;time fuzes F42C0009000000)
Fuzes actuated by exposure to a predetermined ambient fluid pressure
barometric pressure

title.ko: 정해진 기계력, 예. 장력, 비트는 힘, 압력에 의해서 작동하는 신관(탄약의 충격에 의한 것 F42C 1/00; 정해진 유체압력에 의한 것 F42C 5/00)
title.en: Fuzes actuated by application of a predetermined mechanical force, e.g. tension, torsion, pressure (by ammunition impact F42C0001000000;by exposure to a predetermined ambient fluid pressure F42C0005000000)

title.ko: 접촉신관, 즉 미리 설치된 탄약, 예. 지뢰 와 이동표적,예. 인간 간의 기계적 접촉에 의해서 작동하는 신관(F42C 7/04가 우선)
title.en: Contact fuzes, i.e. fuzes actuated by mechanical contact between a stationary ammunition, e.g. a land mine, and a moving target, e.g. a person (F42C0007120000 takes precedence)
actuated by applying pressure on the ammunition head
and comprising pneumatic or hydraulic retarding means
of release type, i.e. actuated by releasing pressure from the ammunition head
of antenna type

title.ko: 이중작동형의 격발신관, 즉 단일동작으로 발포준비와 발포가 이루어지는 신관 예. 내장된 격침 또는 타격해머를 잡아당기므로써 작동하는 것(총용 전관 F42C 19/10)
title.en: Percussion fuzes of the double-action type, i.e. fuzes cocked and fired in a single movement, e.g. by pulling an incorporated percussion pin or hammer (percussion caps F42C0019100000)
Time fuzes; Combined time- and percussion- or pressure-actuated fuzes; Fuzes for timed self-destruction of ammunition
the timing being caused by mechanical means
by spring motor
by flow of fluent material, e.g. shot, fluids
the timing being caused by chemical action, e.g. of acids
the timing being caused by combustion
with ring combustion elements
Double fuzes; Multiple fuzes
for self-destruction of ammunition
when the spin rate falls below a predetermined limit, e.g. a spring force being stronger than the locking action of a centrifugally-operated lock

title.ko: 전기신관(근접신관 F42C 13/00; 전기점화구 F42C 19/12)
title.en: Electric fuzes (proximity fuzes F42C0013000000;electric igniters F42C0019120000)
with piezo-crystal
with current induction
with time delay by electric circuitry
Proximity fuzes; Fuzes for remote detonation
operated by intensity of light or similar radiation
operated by radio waves
operated by sound waves
operated by variations in magnetic field

title.ko: 탄약의 종별 또는 형식에 특징이 있는 것(F42C 1/00, F42C 13/00, F42C 15/00이 우선)
title.en: Fuzes characterised by the ammunition class or type (F42C0001000000, F42C0013000000, F42C0015000000 take precedence)
for hand grenades

title.ko: 어뢰, 기뢰 또는 폭뢰용(감응기뢰 F42B 22/04)
title.en: for torpedoes, marine mines or depth charges (influenced marine mines F42B0022040000)
for fall bombs
for land mines

title.ko: 신관의 기폭정비기구; 신관 또는 장약의 조발방지용 안전기구
title.en: Arming-means in fuzes; Safety means for preventing premature detonation of fuzes or charges

title.ko: 안전을 위하여 격침류를 작동부로부터 떼는 것
title.en: wherein the firing pin is displaced out of the action line for safety (F42C0015400000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 화공품 또는 화약계열의 부재용 캐리어가 작동되는 것(F42C 15/40이 우선)
title.en: wherein a carrier for an element of the pyrotechnic or explosive train is moved (F42C0015400000 takes precedence)
using a slidable carrier
using a rotatable carrier
rotatable in a plane which is parallel to the longitudinal axis of the projectile
by the action of centrifugal or inertia forces on the carrier body, e.g. the carrier having eccentrically mounted weights or eccentric centre of gravity

title.ko: 신관을 기폭정비하기 위하여 안전침 또는 빗장을 빼는 것, 예. 격침에서 빼는 것(F42C 15/40이 우선)
title.en: wherein a securing-pin or latch is removed to arm the fuze, e.g. removed from the firing pin (F42C0015400000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 용수철작용의 사용(F42C 15/23이 우선)
title.en: using spring action (F42C0015230000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 원심력의 사용
title.en: using centrifugal force (F42C0015230000 takes precedence)
by unwinding a flexible ribbon or tape

title.ko: 안전 또는 기폭정비작용이 관성에 의해서 행하여지는 것(F42C 15/196, F42C 15/20이 우선)
title.en: wherein the safety or arming action is effected by inertia means (F42C0015196000, F42C0015200000 take precedence)
using centrifugal force

title.ko: 유동물질, 예. 발사물, 유체의 흐름에 의해서 작동하는 것(F42C 15/26이 우선)
title.en: operated by flow of fluent material, e.g. shot, fluids (F42C0015260000 takes precedence)
stored within the fuze housing
operated by fluidic oscillators; operated by dynamic fluid pressure, e.g. ram-air operated
operated by a turbine or a propeller; Mounting means therefor
of propellant gases, i.e. derived from propulsive charge or rocket motor
generated by the combustion of a pyrotechnic or explosive charge within the fuze

title.ko: 유체압력의 변화에 의해 작동하는 것(F42C 5/00, F42C 15/29가 우선)
title.en: operated by change of fluid pressure (F42C0005000000, F42C0015290000 take precedence)
by breaking a vacuum or pressure container

title.ko: 안전 또는 기폭정비작동이 뇌관장치와 주장약과의 사이에서 불꽃 또는 연속폭발의 차단부품에 의해 행해지는 것(F42C 15/18, F42C 15/40이 우선)
title.en: wherein the safety or arming action is effected by a blocking-member in the pyrotechnic or explosive train between primer and main charge (F42C0015180000, F42C0015400000 take precedence)

title.ko: 기폭정비가 요소의 연소 또는 용융에 의해서 행해지는 것(F42C 15/31이 우선)
title.en: wherein arming is effected by combustion or fusion of an element (F42C0015310000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 기폭정비가 화학작용에 의해서 행해지는 것
title.en: wherein arming is effected by chemical action (F42C0003000000 takes precedence)
wherein the safety or arming action is effected electrically
from a remote location, e.g. for controlled mines or mine fields
Arrangements for disarming, or for rendering harmless, fuzes after arming, e.g. after launch
Fuze-setting apparatus
Fuze-setting keys
for electric fuzes

title.ko: 신관의 세부(조기 폭파를 방지하기 위한 무장 수단, 안전 수단 F42C 15/00)
title.en: Details of fuzes (arming means, safety means for preventing premature detonation F42C0015000000)
Fuze bodies; Fuze housings
Protective caps
Electric contact parts specially adapted for use with electric fuzes
Nose-contacts for projectiles or missiles

title.ko: 뇌관장치(폭파약포용 기폭구 F42B 3/10) 기폭장치
title.en: Primers (initiators for blasting cartridges F42B0003100000); Detonators
Primers for caseless ammunition
Primers or detonators containing a hollow charge
Arrangement of a multiplicity of primers or detonators, dispersed around a warhead, one of the primers or detonators being selected for directional detonation effects
Percussion caps
electric
operable also in the percussion mode
Checking fuzes; Testing fuzes
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
